title: Nearer, My God, to Thee
description: A reflective hymn melody arranged for the runtime-backed letter-note and fingering chart song page.
alignedLyrics: Near er my God to Thee, Near er to Thee!
E'en though it be a cross that _ rais eth me.
Still all my dreams shall be Near er, my God to Thee.
Near er, my god to Thee, Near _ er to Thee!
